segments.text: The Arishakti first to create and then to create human beings.
After that, you comfort them – so many people came on this earth just in the counselling
they told what was wrong or right?
What should we do now?, what is self-respect and
what is the duty of a human being
as superior most creature.
So many came, one after another in every country they came
and their counselling formed religions
Of course you see the mess of the religions
And that's how there life was wasted
that they formed religions after religions, by which only human beings were divided.
Divided to such an extent the hate each other
if somebody born in a ex-religion he hates
the person who followed Shri Mataji, why those who came as counsellors talked about complete
unity.
Complete oneness of human race despite that human brain in its freedom did all kinds
wrong things and created a country or you can say the whole world full of lots
of problems arising out of religion. How can it be that religion makes you hate, suffer?
Religion is there to understand love – to imbibe Love and compassion! So the third
thing one had do was Adi Shaktis job which is Kundalini within us. And by Her awakening
we got pure knowledge, absolute knowledge.
Pure Knowledge that it cannot be challenged absolutely.
Whatever you know after Realization is Absolute
if You Know That then what We have to understand
everything has To Be United
.You Cannot Have Fights
and you cannot eat anymore. If that thing starts happening, all the problems of
world will be finished." So first reduction – that is quality
of Adi Shakti was to redeem people from their wrong ideas about others
Firstly as we know there are six enemies we have got
And unless and until we can conquer those six enemies,
We cannot be a ridiculous person. That's what she said
But actually the all religions are based only on
Prospering those six enemies that they have within also
When you see this clearly You start seeking
You start seeking, seeking earnest the truth and the revelation of truth, absolute truth
can only come through your evolution ,through your reformation that you become person who
knows the truth.
For that Adi Shaktis ascent is important within which are Kundalini.
And when this thing takes place, automatically you drop all those six enemies that you have.
You become a beautiful human being like lotus – it is in the very germinating state and
looks just as small animals or small dirty things which are in the bottom of your body.
And then, when it starts coming out – coming out of that horrible water which becomes such
a beautiful flower rises up and opens heart in the same way as Sahaja Yogi though lives
along with all these horrible things are going on but flowers like a lotus.
It doesn't have all these insects,
or this dirt and filth of that water in which it lives.
Its sucks only the pure Water
And others remain there as they are
So what is left within you
Is nothing but purity beauty and fragrance
Just like a lotus
Then there is no more the problem of getting attacked by all these small, small creatures
in water or all those dirty things that are on the water.
And this state you have achieved now I am very happy to see so many people in America
has achieved here which a great blessing because America is leading country in
So many ways one can say that it has made lots of money.
That is not the criteria for becoming a very good Sahaja Yoga.
What you get in your satisfaction, satisfaction – that you enjoy whatever you have and
what others are having!
And second thing happens to You become absolutely collective this as happen but
But I find still people have not understood the meaning of collectivity.
For example, family is very weak here – family that has been created by natural relationships
is not so much respected as it should have.
It's all because based on money,
some people start quarrelling fighting even killing each other
Now the basis of family is love and compassion
Those who do no this cannot
Have good families
I've seen in among Sahaja Yogis sometime
Some People
Who are working for Money
Sometimes look down upon people who are not so well off or may be the housewives,
working in their houses looking after children building up families
and they're treated with respect as some secret leader of an organization.
I don't know why this kind of a manliness comes into women.
Why should they think that something higher than the woman who are working hard in household,
cooking looking after children wearing all the brunt
of the society.
This is something I feel, it's a part which is lacking very much in America and also
western countries when money becomes important if then money is important than the Lakshmi
principle is not respected – very surprising!
Money is the part, or we should say blessing of the lakshmi but the graha-lakshmi who
a householder he's not respected and with this I tell you there are very
wrong things that can happen. You
You can work, you are educated but should be able to look after your family and look
out for their comforts.
Look at the unity instead of that educated women I call them manly woman.
Educated women think they have something higher than satanism in no way a men is
So this kind of a disparity that exists and one starts thinking
we are earning, you're educated or really manly women I must say.
But the woman who works very hard in household with love
look after her children ,look after their family
they no way less than these people
who are working in the office.
So such women must be respected
by their husbands,
by the men – males of family not only that
but all the Sahaja Yogis must respect
those women
Who're doing
Such a difficult task
I've been housewife
and i know what it is
To run The House
to look after children
to look after the complete organisation and looking after the expenditure of
money, if that is limited. This ego has
go on! The other day one lady she came
as an interviewer asked me how it in this world
of men, you are so much respected. World of Men – I was really laughing! What makes
them think that this is the world for man? Can they exist without women?" But…I
am amazed at her question because she said even in jail criminals have so much respect
How is it possible, how can they have so much respect for a woman?
It's if I cannot understand one thing that criminals
Have got mothers or not. All males don't
They all have mother and
And they respect the mother
That' sthe point you should know
that woman is a much more important thing than the man he's as far as children are concerned.
But I've seen even some ladies who think they're very capable, try to control everything
and create problems! A mother's job it not too controlled
her job its love ,to give compassion
And this is the quality of women who's lost in these Western so-called advanced values.
It was a very dangerous thing, I personally think that if such things happen families
will be destroyed – nobody would have respect for lady looks after family and she
She is more than a prime minister, I would say in her family and she's to be respected
And today i think it important for saying that all of you should understand the value
Of women who are housewives.
It´s tremendous job To Be A Housewife ,I have gone through
and I know what it is, the respect to housewife if not given she won't also look after
children. Children are tomorrow's citizens who will groom them? Who bring
up all these manly women don´t have children sometimes so they
dont'know about problem of children at least those who are solving
the problem of, say children you must understand their responsibility.
This is a very-very crucial point I think on which all
western societies are collapsing because in
there culture no place for them at home so women should not
feel any way less if they're mothers and looking after
household ,they shouldn't feeling inferior to anybody who
that they are something great, basically the families have to be improved.
This collectivity must work first in a family
The children oughta be groomed properly
They're brought up in proper way
As it is on this day you know what's happening
When I read about them I'm really shocked
Children just treated as if there some unwanted stuff
They are not given any attention, ultimately the children become drug addicts.
they can become anything because there is so much neglect and hatred for children
So one has to first remember that for collectivity you must look after your child
Not only that, with love and compassion.
not as somebody who is trying to become a despot out of you
but
A person
Who Is the source
With The Source Of Joy And Compassion
In one my lectures I talked To You About
The Emotional Intelligence
That's What We Should Try To Invite
emotional intelligence. That means the intelligence that is based on emotions, unless and until
we become emotionally intelligent our society cannot do it because in an emotional intelligence
you care or enjoy caring ,you everything for others with a great emotional understanding
Not for one child, not for a son but everyone you have to be emotionally intelligent.
Some children are born like this and some are made like that so they should also be
emotionally intelligent because if the mother or father is money oriented very selfish
They won't allow their child to give anything others, so such a child will grow into very
funny type of person and he'll never do for anybody not even his own country.
Why should you do it?
Everything is selfishness then people indulge in corruption, indulging all kinds things
which are only selfish in attitude.
Now we're talking of collectivity,
in-collectivty
they do for others
We enjoy meaning to others
and love giving things to other
not just about yourself
because your children will also become the same kind
They'll only bother themselves
This emotional intelligence
has been brought into our life
In our matter that we have, are emotionally intelligent or just intelligent and emotional?
Both things are wrong.
If you're just intelligent then can become very dry person
You may be friends maybe but not have
And will always try to preserve yourself away from the collectivity
And if you are emotional, you'll be attached only to one person – attached
to a child maybe.
Attached with just 1% to someone even in the society for no rhyme and reason why?
Why do we attach to that person or why do we bother about this person
Only all such people fall into such terrible pain
In politics as seen how people try
to help their own sons and our daughters, this or that.
And we Indians have suffered a lot with these kind of emotional attachments
so according ethics
Emotional intelligence is the highest quality
by which you give for others
You care about us
For everyone
and you become very,very collected.
Now exclusiveness is another fashion that's very much there it's exclusive
because we don't want to be one of the multitudes
for them being exclusive
You should be exclusive in emotional intelligence
not all other things
That if best thing you can have
as I agree am just a woman
and just a mother, but what I have is really the emotional intelligence ocean of it.
And from that i know about everybody
understand everything
all this work has been done because
quality in my head
am not attached to one person or
one style, whatever you say I can understand because am at a level where i
could understand everything that we are doing. To achieve
That You try to develop emotional intelligence
Here the children won't even give toy for somebody
Even if mother is like them father will be like them
Extremely selfish and We must have our own
This has to go, this has to from American specially because they are the leading nation
in these kinds of selfishness.
What selfishness have done I did not count but you know that?
You can ask people Canada Mexico Peru all things they will tell you
Being selfish their not ashamed, their exploiters there is no shame
Nobody can even tell them because they think that very rich people, but all these riches
will not give him the joy of life.
Joy is only in emotional intelligence
If you don't have it becomes very dry
Life become very unbearable and even family gets broken up
if there is no emotional intelligence in the family.
I have known so many women
who had three marriages, five marriages
–I don't know how they can do it-
but They've done
because this lack of emotional intelligence
It's something that
has a sense giving
and not that you are sacrificing anything
That also another idea
we need to bear these
nothing like
Look at the life of Christ, He gave His Life.
Why? What was a need for Him to do that?
Behind it were The Truths
When you have truth with You
–the light Of The Truth
,The force Of The Truth
.The strength Of The Truth
…you become emotionally intelligent
..You understand
That if you really love something
then you had to undergo
every kind
I know it's too much to say, but i thought that for this special puja
I should say something about the Sahaja Yoga.
In our ashrams or in out programs
Or wherever we are
We shoud remember atleast one
That are you having
that emotional intelligence when
When we are trying to talk about Sahaja Yoga, why do I need
every place tell them what is the need? You can
if you have that emotional intention
everybody will listen. Why not? Not necessarily
should go everywhere and how many countries
And reaction to it so beautiful
So nice very surprising like in a country
like Benin country, all Muslims there or black people – they have become Sahaja Yogis.
Nine thousand people! How could I capture that? Just think of
nine-thousand people somebody would come. Then also other countries
are seen just this is the power of emotional intelligence
captures the heart of people. You may have any amount
property, money everything
People will abhor it so you say what's wrong?
What is this that your harming
The greatest thing
as a politician they are horrible
Why because they have no emotional intelligence
Also, as administrators they are very much difficult because
They have no emotional intelligence.
All these people
Are devoid of that great quality
Of Emotional Intelligence
If your country is very progressive
I must say you must progress in emotional intelligence
That way there are philanthropists
I know Americans are known to be philanthropist
But behind that is they want to have power,
They wanna rule people with their mind.
It's not emotional intelligence
it just wants them to rule
if there starts some sort of a charity
That means having big name on the television
or to have very big advertisement about
Oh, here you are
and then he moves like tycoon all over
We part of it they will dominate, we are a part of their property.
Work out and make such a fuss about because
They want to cash everything. Cash has been given so cash them
You're Sahaja Yogis you have send waves
Of emotional intelligence
You've sent love all over the world
You have to show how you can meet love, we know.
It is also possible if your not so attached –
If they are attached say…
…to their country only
Now this a bigger issue
Then will try to exploit other countries
Take advantage of them
Try run it down
But emotionally attach with the country
then you will bring good name to your country by doing real, good work.
I don't know why people do not how discriminate?
Why are they so selfish trying build them up
or try all the
things for themselves
there is a very great chance
of getting this within their reach
because we're all Sahaja Yogis
You have become like lotuses
And the lotus has a fragrance which spreads all over and days together it stays in that
dirty water, and it spreads the fragrance.
With this fragrance also you can do lots of things – that bees come there they sleep
In that beautiful house of a lotus and in the night it closes down very carefully.
All kinds things, let come for flower take little bit beauty out from
We can say because you extract also the essence of that which has a fragrance
You can also get some honey out of that, whatever is possible everybody comes to that flower.
That doesn't mean the flower in any way weak but thats his quality,
Thats strength ,thats understanding
Thats what you are
Your all made into dotases
You are not made into some sort of creeps or some sort
stupid donkeys, no.
you're the people who want to give fragrance
your love, fragrance of compassion
and should feel happy about it
That doesn't mean that will give up this, nothing like that
but means whatever is your possibility
You must try to do for others, give into them and the more you do it this collectivity that's
what is very important at least in America because everybody trying follow America.
Money making business ,this business but you are Sahaja Yogis so what we have
to do is take advantage of your achievement and give this to others, give realizations
too other.
Many people who get realization don't even bother about it they just don´t go
spread Sahaja Yoga ,they are not bothered which sometimes very shocking me because
what was the need for Me going around whole world with all mad people living talking
to them about Sahaja Yoga.
In the same way you should also feel now that we have do this one, they are changing people
and get them into Sahaj yoga – why can't it be?
We're so many people!
Christ had only twelve disciples how much they spread Christianity.
What about you people who were so well equipped with so much of knowledge absolute
knowledge and experience.
So if you have the experience, then your knowledge can capture people but there is some sort
of lurking ambition which goes against the culture of Sahaja Yoga – they want to be
leader or put down somebody who thinks no end for themselves that's not good
And also they do Sahaja Yoga or spread Sahaj yoga because
They want to enhance themselves.
The way is a complete surrender,
Complete surrender
To the work of Sahaja Yoga
It's possible
it´s not difficult at all as I am telling you
Its very-very simple
Only thing
You should understand that
We have
A special place
In whole universe today
You are not to rot, you're not to waste your life.
We have started marriages and in America also they say all right we'll have marriage

If there like other ordinary marraiges whats their use
What are They doing for others
what sort of children Their producing

your love for the family is of a diffrent type
The whole family also is your family
So everyone must have compassion

And I know one day,
America will lead so many people,
thousands in Sahaja Yoga

they have to change atmosphere

Your Sahaja Yogis.

they have not ordinary
